## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss AI's impact on e-commerce, consumer behavior, and marketing strategies in light of emerging LLM technologies.](https://fathom.video/share/J8rJXbQ66PXTA_4fKzNPW2-_M_-X5keV?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [E-commerce front-end may shift dramatically with ChatGPT enabling direct purchases within 6-9 months](https://fathom.video/share/J8rJXbQ66PXTA_4fKzNPW2-_M_-X5keV?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [Voice interaction could replace keyboards for the next generation, potentially impacting literacy](https://fathom.video/share/J8rJXbQ66PXTA_4fKzNPW2-_M_-X5keV?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
  - [AI is empowering consumers, shifting business interaction costs from consumers to sellers](https://fathom.video/share/J8rJXbQ66PXTA_4fKzNPW2-_M_-X5keV?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)
  - [Marketing funnels and retargeting strategies may become obsolete in an AI-native world](https://fathom.video/share/J8rJXbQ66PXTA_4fKzNPW2-_M_-X5keV?tab=summary&timestamp=1019.0)

## Topics

### The Future of E-commerce

  - [Shift from traditional e-commerce websites to AI-driven interfaces](https://fathom.video/share/J8rJXbQ66PXTA_4fKzNPW2-_M_-X5keV?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)
  - [Potential end of traditional e-commerce front-end](https://fathom.video/share/J8rJXbQ66PXTA_4fKzNPW2-_M_-X5keV?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)

### AI's Impact on Consumer Behavior

  - [Easier for consumers to write complaints and legal letters using AI](https://fathom.video/share/J8rJXbQ66PXTA_4fKzNPW2-_M_-X5keV?tab=summary&timestamp=665.0)

  - [Increased willingness to address issues due to reduced effort](https://fathom.video/share/J8rJXbQ66PXTA_4fKzNPW2-_M_-X5keV?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)
